policy.gt_source: manual inspection of clean_v2 extracted video frames only
policy.notes: Only static category regions on the Annie Italian Restaurant menu are annotated. Other restaurant menus and business/property checks remain pending.

annotations.visual_reference: Annie menu category region: SELECTED STEAKS

expected_region.description: right page dark green box with white heading
expected_region.notes: The clearest Annie menu frame for annie_butcher_1.mp4 is used; other restaurant menu frames are excluded.

event_gt.evidence: Inspected _annotation/frames/annie_butcher_1/contact_sheet_labeled.jpg and clear Annie menu frames.

detail_gt.evidence: The visible Annie menu heading for the referenced region reads SELECTED STEAKS.
